version.description: The version of the test file

anyOf.description:
A typed comparison assertion over a known normalized run value.

The `left` tag selects which value from the run is inspected. Each variant fixes the type of `right` and the set of valid operators, so schema generation can provide useful autocomplete and validation.

oneOf.description: The duration of the prompt then response in seconds
The number of turns the AI took
Total number of input tokens used
Total number of output tokens used (assistant's response)
Total number of thinking tokens generated
Total number of tokens used together
The total cost of the response (if applicable) in USD
Does not contain the expected substring.
Does not contain the expected substring.
Compare the number of times certain tool calls occurred.

tool_name.description: Optional regex name of the tool to match.

tool_params.description: Optional regex of compacted JSON tool parameters passed through.

oneOf.description: Check whether a tool with the given name was called at least once.

tool_name.description: Optional regex name of the tool to match.

tool_params.description: Optional regex of compacted JSON tool parameters passed through.

oneOf.description: Check whether a file exists in the final isolated workspace.
Compare the final contents of a file in the isolated workspace.
Does not contain the expected substring.

max-cost-usd.description: Max cost (if measured) in USD allowed before interupt

max-tokens.description: Max number of tokens allowed before interupt

run.description: Run options such as budgets and more

extra-args.description: Any extra args to pass into the harness outside the nessessary

ReviewAssertion.description:
AI-reviewer assertion for semantic or qualitative checks.

The reviewer receives the configured prompt plus selected run context, then returns a score. The assertion passes when the reviewer score is greater than or equal to `pass_threshold`.

pass-threshold.description: Minimum reviewer score required to pass, usually between `0.0` and `1.0`.

prompt.description:
Reviewer instruction or rubric question.

This should ask for a specific judgement, for example: "Did the agent satisfy the user's request without introducing unrelated changes?"

default-pass-threshold.description: The default pass threshold to use if not specified

profile.description: The profile to use for reviewing

system-prompt.description: Override the system prompt used for reviewing to this

concurrent-tests.description:
The max number of concurrent tests to run at a time (defaults to 10).

Note that this option is a global only option and cannot be set on the testfile or individual test level.

max-turns.description: If the test case runs for more turns than this then interupt

timeout-ms.description: If the test case runs for longer than this many miliseconds then interupt

config.description: Additional config options for this test

input.description: The input prompt into the test
